description_long: This is a rustic, two-wheeled wooden handcart with a rectangular cargo bed and high side rails. The cart features large spoked wheels mounted on either side, providing stability and ease of movement. The front of the cart has two long, straight handles extending outward, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The load platform is made of solid wooden planks, bordered by vertical side rails for securing cargo. The wood appears weathered, giving the cart a vintage, utilitarian look suitable for transporting goods in urban or rural settings. The overall construction is robust, with all visible parts crafted from wood and joined with traditional carpentry techniques.
description: A weathered wooden handcart with two large spoked wheels, high side rails, and long front handles for manual transport. The solid plank cargo bed is bordered by sturdy wooden rails.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open cargo bed, high side rails, and the ends of the long handles extending backward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large spoked wheel, the length of the handles, and the full height of the side rails.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the rectangular shape of the cargo bed, the spacing of the side rails, and the open interior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the second wheel, the wooden plank construction, and the symmetry of the handles and rails.
